Title Infringement - Free Practice 3 Double Yellow Flags Deleted Lap Times

2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 
17 – 19 July 2026 
 
  
  
From The Stewards      Document 42 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  18 July 2026 
 
        T i m e   14:25 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag zone will be deleted as detailed in the 
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 9, document 6): 
 
Session Free Practice 3 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved 
yellow flag marshalling sector.
